title: Require Domain Ops Registry Surface
forbids: domain ops/index.ts registries doing anything other than importing operation entrypoints and assembling the default implementation registry
why: The domain operation registry assembles operation implementations for root ops.ts. Helper constants, reusable policy, contract schemas, data, source-forwarded details, and convenience operation exports must move to their owning files or be consumed through the domain ops object.
remediate: Keep ops/index.ts to implementation imports, the implementations registry, and the default export. Move reusable helpers to model/policy or model/schemas, keep operation-local internals in operation-local files, and consume operations through the domain ops object.
message: Domain ops/index.ts must be the implementation registry only.
